gist.headline: A new bloom in the greenhouse
gist.blurb: OrchidLLM just sprouted in our community showcase! It's a beautiful new app for generating images, text, video, audio, and transcriptions all in one place.
gist.summary: Added OrchidLLM to the community app showcase and greenhouse.
gist.impact: Users can now discover OrchidLLM, a new multi-modal generation app built by the community.
gist.visual_concept: The PR adds 'OrchidLLM' to the community 'Greenhouse'. The visual should feature a beautiful pixel-art orchid flower growing in a cozy greenhouse setting, with Polly the bee happily watering or tending to it.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny gardener's hat, watering a glowing digital orchid plant inside a glass greenhouse. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Text in pixel font: 'ORCHID LLM'. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
